title: Section 28
content: 1[28. Statement and return of investment of assets.--Every insurer shall submit to the Authority returns giving details of investments made, in such form, time and manner including its authentication as may be specified by the regulations.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 5 of 2015, s. 27, for section 28, section 28A and section 28B (w.e.f. 26-12-2014).
